name: notion-search
description: Search across your Notion workspace and connected tools like Slack, Google Drive, and Jira.

name: notion-fetch
description: Retrieves content from pages, databases, or data sources by URL/ID; supports fetching data source schemas and templates.

name: notion-create-pages
description: Creates one or more Notion pages with specified properties and content. Supports applying database templates.

name: notion-update-page
description: Update a Notion page's properties, content, icon, or cover. Supports applying database templates.

name: notion-move-pages
description: Move one or more Notion pages or databases to a new parent.

name: notion-duplicate-page
description: Duplicate a Notion page within your workspace. This action completes asynchronously.

name: notion-create-database
description: Creates a new Notion database, initial data source, and initial view with the specified properties.

name: notion-update-data-source
description: Update a Notion data source's properties, name, description, or other attributes.

name: notion-create-view
description: Create a new view on a Notion database. Supports table, board, list, calendar, timeline, gallery, form, chart, map, and dashboard view types.

name: notion-update-view
description: Update a view's name, filters, sorts, or display configuration. Only the fields you specify will be changed.

name: notion-query-data-sources
description: Query across multiple Notion data sources directly with structured summaries, grouping, and filters.

name: notion-query-database-view
description: Query data from a Notion database using a pre-defined view's filters and sorts.

name: notion-create-comment
description: Add a comment to a page or specific content. Supports page-level comments, block-level comments, and replies.

name: notion-get-comments
description: Lists all comments and discussions on a page. Can include block-level and inline discussions, resolved threads.

name: notion-get-teams
description: Retrieves a list of teams (teamspaces) in the current workspace.

name: notion-get-users
description: Lists all users in the workspace with their details.

name: notion-get-user
description: Retrieve your user information by ID.

name: notion-get-self
description: Retrieves information about your own bot user and the Notion workspace you're connected to.
